title: Crunchy Sour Jamaican Tomatoes Salad
description: A bright, tangy salad that blends broiled canned tomatoes with fresh veggies and a zesty lime-olive dressing, perfect for mealprep and a crunchy bite.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to high and line a broiler pan with parchment paper.
Drain the canned tomatoes, leaving the juices, and spread them on the pan. Broil for 2-3 minutes until the tops are slightly caramelized.
While the tomatoes broil, dice the cucumber, bell pepper, and red onion, and chop the cilantro.
Drain the corn kernels and rinse them under cold water.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the broiled tomatoes with the diced veggies, corn, chopped cilantro, and slivered scallions.
In a small bowl whisk together the olive oil, lime juice, salt, pepper, and sugar until the dressing emulsifies.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently to coat all ingredients evenly.
Cover the bowl with cling film and refrigerate for 1‑3 days; the flavors meld while the salad stays crisp.
Serve chilled or at room temperature, ensuring each bite has a zesty, crunchy experience.
